name: ultracrm-ai
description: UltraCRM AI - CRM conversacional multi-tenant com WhatsApp, IA e RAG.

scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace packages/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/api run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck
